meaning: n.<法> 味,趣味,嗜好,一滴,痛风,一团
examples: How I creak; now I shall certainly get the gout, like the old clothespress, ugh!
Has not gout pinched your limbs?
Gout has been on the increase in the developed world for the past 30 years.
However, a spokesman for Guildford Borough Council was sceptical that the town was plagued by gout.
